subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 782237334/251015673 is not a GRB
body:
S. Bala (USRA) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 782237334/251015673 at 16:08:49.43 UT
on 15 October 2025, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to distant particles."
